title: phelypaea stricta
intro: Phelypaea stricta, also known as the strict phlox or purple phlox, is a perennial flowering plant native to the eastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phelypaea stricta include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phelypaea stricta include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
